claims.summary: Mode packing around 0.29 with low porosity can feel like a pressure/porosity dead zone below the live expansion threshold.
claims.rationale: Added diagnostic-only felt-dead-zone reporting with live, liminal, and felt thresholds plus threshold gap; no pressure, porosity, or controller authority changed.

claims.summary: Lowering the live expansion threshold from 0.40 toward 0.25 or changing the liminal threshold would directly alter pressure/porosity behavior.
claims.rationale: Threshold retuning is live substrate/control-adjacent and remains Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work.

claims.summary: The 60s stale window may be too tight under high entropy or high pressure, but cadence changes affect live status interpretation.
claims.rationale: Existing dynamic windows already extend some high-pressure/high-entropy cases; any global or behavioral stale-window retune requires operator approval.
